Locksmith Services in St. Louis, MO

Professional residential, commercial, and automotive locksmith solutions available 24/7

Call Now: (314) 532-1112

Emergency Services

Urgent lock and key situations that need immediate attention, any time of day or night.

Emergency

Commercial Lockout Service

Locked out of your business? We get you back inside fast with no damage to your storefront, office, or commercial door.

Learn More
Emergency

24 Hour Emergency Locksmith

Urgent lock or key emergency? Our 24/7 mobile locksmiths respond fast across the entire St. Louis area.

Learn More

Automotive Services

Car keys, lockouts, ignition repair, and key fob services for all vehicle makes and models.

Automotive

Car Lockout Service

Locked out of your car? Our mobile locksmiths arrive fast to safely unlock your vehicle without damage.

Learn More
Automotive

Car Key Replacement

Lost or broken car keys? We cut and program replacement keys on-site for all makes and models.

Learn More
Automotive

Key Fob Programming

Need a new key fob or remote programmed? We program and replace key fobs on-site for most vehicles.

Learn More
Automotive

Ignition Repair

Key won't turn in the ignition? We repair and replace car ignition cylinders on-site.

Learn More

Residential Services

Home lock installation, rekeying, smart locks, and lockout services to protect your family.

Residential

House Lockout Service

Locked out of your home? We use non-destructive methods to get you back inside fast, day or night.

Learn More
Residential

Lock Rekey Service

Change who has access to your home without replacing your locks. Rekeying is fast, affordable, and effective.

Learn More
Residential

Lock Installation & Replacement

New lock installation and old lock replacement for homes and businesses. Deadbolts, knobs, levers, and more.

Learn More
Residential

Smart Lock Installation

Upgrade to keyless convenience with professional smart lock installation. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and keypad locks.

Learn More

General Services

Specialized locksmith services for common lock and key problems.

General

Broken Key Extraction

Key snapped off in your lock? We extract broken keys and cut replacements on the spot.

Learn More
General

Safe Opening & Repair

Locked out of your safe? We open residential and commercial safes without destroying the contents or the safe itself.

Learn More

Not Sure Which Service You Need?

Call us and describe your situation. Our team will recommend the right service and provide an upfront price before sending a locksmith.

Call (314) 532-1112

Nonstop Lock & Key

Your trusted 24/7 locksmith service in St. Louis, MO. Fast, reliable, and professional locksmith solutions for residential, commercial, and automotive security needs.
